mapper.sql: id, course_id, parent_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_message WHERE course_id = #{query.courseId} AND deleted = 0 AND parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM edu_message WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_message (course_id, parent_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_message SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
